body: PT Astrindo Nusantara Infrastruktur Tbk (BIPI) reported a 15.05% year-on-year revenue decline to USD 418.07 million and an 89.7% net profit drop to USD 3.58 million in the first nine months of 2024, but its shares remain a favorite among investors, with a net foreign buy of 216.3 million shares. Despite the decline, BIPI has set an optimistic 10% growth target for the year, driven by projected increases in coal prices, and has secured significant credit facilities from PT Bank Mandiri Tbk (BMRI) for refinancing purposes.
title: PT Astrindo Nusantara Infrastruktur's shares remain investors' favorite despite slight decline in performance.
